# Vedant Sudhir Deshmukh (Vedant9500)

Computer Engineering Student building symbolic regression systems, Model Context Protocol (MCP) memory tooling, and Go CLI utilities.

## Profile Summary
*   **Role:** Computer Engineering Student
*   **Focus:** Machine Learning, C++, Go, Developer Tools, Systems Programming
*   **Location:** India (IST)
*   **GitHub:** [github.com/Vedant9500](https://github.com/Vedant9500)
*   **LinkedIn:** [linkedin.com/in/vedant-deshmukh-82441928b/](https://www.linkedin.com/in/vedant-deshmukh-82441928b/)
*   **Website:** [vedantium.dev](https://vedantium.dev/)

## Core Projects

### [Glassbox](https://github.com/Vedant9500/Glassbox)
Symbolic regression engine that uses operation neural networks to discover mathematical equations directly from data. Features fast-path equation search, evolutionary optimization, and C++ backends.
*   **Stack:** Python, C++

### [OpenLMlib](https://github.com/Vedant9500/OpenLMlib)
Model Context Protocol (MCP) server providing persistent, searchable note memory for AI agents. Designed to prevent token-drift in long chat sessions through SQLite vector/text search integration.
*   **Stack:** Python, SQLite

### [What's The Function (WTF)](https://github.com/Vedant9500/WTF)
Go-based CLI utility that translates natural language intent into shell commands. Combines fuzzy search, platform filters, context-based boosts, and history logs for faster terminal workflows.
*   **Stack:** Go

## Navigation
*   [Home](https://vedantium.dev/) - Developer portfolio and project summaries.
*   [Journal / Blog](https://vedantium.dev/blog/) - Engineering updates, build journal, and project writeups.
